---
title: "NPE KnowledgeBase"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
.npe-shell {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: 1rem 0 2rem;
}
.npe-shell::before,
.npe-shell::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: auto;
  width: 24rem;
  height: 24rem;
  border-radius: 50%;
  filter: blur(24px);
  opacity: 0.28;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.npe-shell::before {
  top: -8rem;
  right: -8rem;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(192,90,74,0.28) 0%, rgba(192,90,74,0.05) 70%, transparent 72%);
}
.npe-shell::after {
  left: -10rem;
  bottom: -10rem;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(30,58,42,0.18) 0%, rgba(30,58,42,0.04) 70%, transparent 72%);
}
.npe-hero {
  position: relative;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.95), rgba(248,247,245,0.92));
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 28px;
  padding: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 3rem);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
}
.npe-kicker {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  padding: 0.28rem 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--tag-bg);
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.npe-kicker::before {
  content: '';
  width: 0.5rem;
  height: 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--accent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(192,90,74,0.12);
}
.npe-hero-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.25fr) minmax(280px, 0.75fr);
  gap: 2rem;
  align-items: start;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.npe-title {
  font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 4rem);
  line-height: 0.98;
  margin: 0.7rem 0 1rem;
}
.npe-lead {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  max-width: 62ch;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}
.npe-actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.7rem;
  margin: 1.1rem 0 0.3rem;
}
.npe-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  padding: 0.72rem 1.1rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--navy);
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}
.npe-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); }
.npe-btn-primary {
  background: var(--navy);
  color: #fff !important;
}
.npe-btn-primary:hover {
  background: var(--navy-light);
  border-color: var(--navy-light);
  color: #fff !important;
}
.npe-btn-secondary {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--navy) !important;
}
.npe-btn-secondary:hover {
  background: var(--tag-bg);
}
.npe-meta-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.9rem;
}
.npe-meta-card {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 1rem 1rem 0.95rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.npe-meta-label {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}
.npe-meta-card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
}
.npe-meta-card p {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.npe-strip {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin: 1.4rem 0 0;
}
.npe-pill {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.npe-pill strong {
  display: block;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 0.96rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
.npe-pill span {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.87rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 1.55;
}
.npe-section {
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 24px;
  padding: 1.4rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.npe-section h2 {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
  font-size: 1.35rem;
}
.npe-section p.section-intro {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  margin-top: 0;
  max-width: 72ch;
}
.npe-what-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.npe-info-card {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 1rem;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fff, #faf9f7);
}
.npe-info-card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
}
.npe-info-card ul {
  margin: 0;
  padding-left: 1.15rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
}
.npe-info-card li + li { margin-top: 0.4rem; }
.npe-flow {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.npe-step {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 1rem;
  background: var(--cream);
}
.npe-step-num {
  width: 2rem;
  height: 2rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  background: var(--navy);
  color: #fff;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.npe-step h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
}
.npe-step p {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.npe-request {
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 24px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #ffffff, #f8f6f1);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
}
.npe-request-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 0.9fr;
  gap: 1.2rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.npe-request-note {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 18px;
  background: rgba(238, 242, 248, 0.7);
  padding: 1rem;
}
.npe-request-note h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
}
.npe-request-note p,
.npe-request-note li {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.npe-form {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.9rem;
}
.npe-field {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}
.npe-field label {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--navy);
}
.npe-input,
.npe-textarea {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  color: var(--text);
  padding: 0.72rem 0.85rem;
  font: inherit;
  outline: none;
  transition: border-color 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease;
}
.npe-input:focus,
.npe-textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--navy);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(30,58,42,0.08);
}
.npe-textarea {
  min-height: 120px;
  resize: vertical;
}
.npe-form-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: 0.15rem;
}
.npe-status {
  display: none;
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  line-height: 1.55;
  padding: 0.8rem 0.95rem;
  border-radius: 12px;
}
.npe-status.ok {
  display: block;
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #166534;
}
.npe-status.fail {
  display: block;
  background: #fee2e2;
  color: #991b1b;
}
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .npe-hero-grid,
  .npe-request-grid,
  .npe-what-grid,
  .npe-flow,
  .npe-strip {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>
```

::: npe-shell
::: npe-hero
<span class="npe-kicker">Public front door</span>

<div class="npe-hero-grid">
<div>
# NPE KnowledgeBase

<p class="npe-lead">A curated resource hub for National Psychology Exam preparation and clinical practice. The public website explains access and handles requests. The private library stays inside Google Workspace, with approved-user gating in Apps Script and files stored in private Drive.</p>

<div class="npe-actions">
[Request access](#request-access){.npe-btn .npe-btn-primary}
[What lives where](#what-lives-where){.npe-btn .npe-btn-secondary}
</div>
</div>

<div class="npe-meta-grid">
<div class="npe-meta-card">
<div class="npe-meta-label">Public site</div>
<h3>Open landing page</h3>
<p>Explains the hub, who it is for, and how approval works.</p>
</div>
<div class="npe-meta-card">
<div class="npe-meta-label">Private hub</div>
<h3>Apps Script backend</h3>
<p>Resources, sessions, and uploads stay behind Google sign-in plus approval.</p>
</div>
<div class="npe-meta-card">
<div class="npe-meta-label">Uploads</div>
<h3>Private Drive only</h3>
<p>Files live in a controlled Drive folder, not in the public Git repo.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="npe-strip">
<div class="npe-pill"><strong>Public</strong><span>Website pages, access explanation, and the request form.</span></div>
<div class="npe-pill"><strong>Approved users</strong><span>Browse resources, sessions, and view Drive links.</span></div>
<div class="npe-pill"><strong>Admin only</strong><span>Upload files, manage approvals, and seed sessions.</span></div>
</div>
:::

::: npe-section
<span id="what-lives-where"></span>
## What lives where

<p class="section-intro">The cleanest setup is a public Quarto site for the branded front door and a private Apps Script hub for authenticated functionality. That keeps the public repo simple and makes the security boundary explicit.</p>

<div class="npe-what-grid">
<div class="npe-info-card">
<h3>Quarto site</h3>
<ul>
<li>Landing page and explanation</li>
<li>Request-access form</li>
<li>Public-facing updates or announcements</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="npe-info-card">
<h3>Apps Script hub</h3>
<ul>
<li>Approved-user check</li>
<li>Resource browsing and uploads</li>
<li>Sessions and calendar data</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
:::

::: npe-section
## How access works

<p class="section-intro">A simple manual approval workflow is usually the most robust for a small member space. It avoids overengineering, keeps your access list auditable, and lets you revoke access cleanly if needed.</p>

<div class="npe-flow">
<div class="npe-step">
<div class="npe-step-num">1</div>
<h3>Request access</h3>
<p>Users submit this form from the public website with their name, email, and a short reason.</p>
</div>
<div class="npe-step">
<div class="npe-step-num">2</div>
<h3>Approve manually</h3>
<p>You add them to the Approved Users sheet and set Status to Approved.</p>
</div>
<div class="npe-step">
<div class="npe-step-num">3</div>
<h3>Enter the hub</h3>
<p>The Apps Script app checks the signed-in email and only serves approved users.</p>
</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.npe-request #request-access}
## Request access

<p class="section-intro">Use this form to request access to the private hub. Requests go straight to your inbox, and you can copy approved users into the Apps Script sheet when ready.</p>

<div class="npe-request-grid">
<div>
<form id="npe-access-form" class="npe-form" onsubmit="return submitAccessRequest(event)">
  <input type="hidden" name="access_key" value="03b4348e-774c-4e7b-9300-f9f602cecc75">
  <input type="hidden" name="subject" value="NPE KnowledgeBase access request — connorconkeymorrison.com">

  <div class="npe-field">
    <label for="npe-name">Name</label>
    <input id="npe-name" class="npe-input" name="name" type="text" placeholder="Your name" required>
  </div>

  <div class="npe-field">
    <label for="npe-email">Email</label>
    <input id="npe-email" class="npe-input" name="email" type="email" placeholder="you@example.com" required>
  </div>

  <div class="npe-field">
    <label for="npe-role">Role or relationship</label>
    <input id="npe-role" class="npe-input" name="role" type="text" placeholder="For example: peer, colleague, student, supervisor">
  </div>

  <div class="npe-field">
    <label for="npe-reason">Why do you need access?</label>
    <textarea id="npe-reason" class="npe-textarea" name="message" placeholder="A short note is enough" required></textarea>
  </div>

  <div class="npe-form-actions">
    <button type="submit" class="npe-btn npe-btn-primary" id="npe-submit">Request access</button>
    <a class="npe-btn npe-btn-secondary" href="mailto:connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com?subject=NPE%20KnowledgeBase%20access%20request">Email instead</a>
  </div>

  <p id="npe-status" class="npe-status"></p>
</form>
</div>

<aside class="npe-request-note">
<h3>What happens next</h3>
<p>You review the request, copy the user into the Approved Users sheet, and set their status to <strong>Approved</strong>. The Apps Script hub will then let them in when they sign in with the same Google account.</p>
<p>This keeps the public site simple and the actual permission check where it belongs: on the server.</p>
<ul>
<li>Approved users can browse resources and sessions.</li>
<li>Uploads stay in a private Drive folder.</li>
<li>Revoked users are blocked server-side.</li>
</ul>
</aside>
</div>
:::
:::

```{=html}
<script>
async function submitAccessRequest(event) {
  event.preventDefault();
  const form = document.getElementById('npe-access-form');
  const status = document.getElementById('npe-status');
  const submit = document.getElementById('npe-submit');

  status.className = 'npe-status';
  status.textContent = '';
  submit.disabled = true;
  submit.textContent = 'Sending...';

  try {
    const response = await fetch('https://api.web3forms.com/submit', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: new FormData(form)
    });
    const result = await response.json();

    if (!result.success) throw new Error(result.message || 'Submission failed');

    status.className = 'npe-status ok';
    status.textContent = 'Request sent. You will be added to the Approved Users sheet after review.';
    form.reset();
  } catch (error) {
    status.className = 'npe-status fail';
    status.textContent = 'Request failed. Try again or email directly.';
  } finally {
    submit.disabled = false;
    submit.textContent = 'Request access';
  }

  return false;
}
</script>
```
